name: Advanced Mathematics
description: Master calculus, algebra, geometry, and statistics with interactive lessons designed for Cameroonian secondary and high school students. Prepare for university entrance exams.

name: English Language & Literature
description: Improve your English proficiency with comprehensive grammar, vocabulary, reading comprehension, and literature analysis. Perfect for GCE and university preparation.

name: Physics & Physical Sciences
description: Explore mechanics, electricity, magnetism, optics, and modern physics through hands-on virtual experiments and real-world applications.

name: Chemistry & Life Sciences
description: Learn organic and inorganic chemistry, biochemistry, and biology with interactive simulations and practical applications relevant to Cameroonian context.

name: History & Social Sciences
description: Study Cameroonian history, African history, world history, geography, and civic education with culturally relevant content and local context.

name: French Language & Francophone Literature
description: Master French language skills with focus on Francophone African literature, grammar, and communication for bilingual education in Cameroon.
